title: Mahamaya Dham
tagline: Mahamaya Dham — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Mahamaya Dham or Mahamaya (supreme illusion) Temple of Bogribari, about 30 km east from Dhubri town and 10 km west from Bilasipara town, is regarded as a greatest Shakta pithas for
overview.description: Mahamaya Dham or Mahamaya (supreme illusion) Temple of Bogribari, about 30 km east from Dhubri town and 10 km west from Bilasipara town, is regarded as a greatest Shakta pithas for Hindu pilgrims in Lower Assam, India. It is located under Parbatjhora sub-division of district Kokrajhar. In terms of attractions, this temple is the second to Kamakhya Temple of Guwahati to the pilgrims and tourists. It is believed that the famous goddess Mahamaya was traditionally worshipped by the local people of Parvatjowar like Kacharies, Koches and Naths.

topPlaces.name: Panbari Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Panbari Mosque, also known as the Rangamati Mosque, is an historic mosque in northeast India and is considered to be the oldest mosque in the Indian state of Assam. The mosque is situated on the National Highway 17, near Panbari and Rangamati, approximately 25 kilometres (16 mi) east from Dhubri town.

items.note: The Panbari Mosque, also known as the Rangamati Mosque, is an historic mosque in northeast India and is considered to be the oldest mosque in the Indian state of Assam. The mosque is situated on the National Highway 17, near Panbari and Rangamati, approximately 25 kilometres (16 mi) east from Dhubri town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahamaya Dham?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahamaya Dham is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahamaya Dham?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (147 km) and the nearest railway station is Alipurduar Junction (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahamaya Dham?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahamaya Dham at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahamaya Dham?
faq.a: Stays in Mahamaya Dham start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahamaya Dham?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panbari Mosque.
